pending
q-import { q-components.qhtml } q-import { page-builder/page-builder-starter.qhtml } q-page-builder-frame { header { h2 { text { Smoke Header } } } body { p { text { Body content } } } footer { p { text { Footer content } } } } q-builder { q-builder-runtime: "1" style { display: none; } } onReady { var builder = this.querySelector("q-builder[q-builder-runtime='1']"); if (builder && typeof builder.setInspectMode === "function") { builder.setInspectMode(true, this); } }
